source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for sturdy English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for confident Japanese labels, compact numeric data, and calm highland documentation.
layout: Precise 8px grids, 8px radii, spine-like dividers, bract-scale texture, mineral borders, and grounded shadows for dependable identity workflows.

prompts.label: Transparent thistle flower motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Thistle transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a thistle flower botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A sturdy highland meadow thistle flower: one rounded violet-purple bloom with many fine tubular petals, silver-green spiny bracts, serrated prickly leaves, a strong ribbed stem, dusty violet shadows, mineral meadow neutrals, crisp botanical detail. Accurate thistle form, resilient upright identity, no vase, no insects.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the bloom, bracts, upper stem, and a few spined leaves without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #0000ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #0000ff or blue anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no second flower, no landscape, no meadow scene, no hand, no vase, no text, no watermark, no floor plane, no decorative background.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Thistle light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Thistle", derived from the visible thistle flower cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible sturdy identity system.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, target 3840 x 2160 pixels. Clean professional UI design-system presentation with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Thistle, Thistle Flower, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language only from purple thistle bloom, silver-green spiny bracts, serrated meadow leaves, ribbed stem, mineral meadow fog, highland stone neutrals, and sturdy spine accents. The board must read as thistle, not lavender, artichoke, cactus, generic floral UI, or one-note purple.
Typography: English product UI examples plus Japanese typography guidance; use short labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文. Keep text large and legible.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-style buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, search field, sidebar navigation, top nav, dashboard metric cards, data chart, status chips, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, 8px radius sample, border and shadow tokens, texture swatches, simple icons.
Style: sturdy refined identity system, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, pale highland-fog background, thistle-purple primary actions, silver-green secondary surfaces, deep plum text, mineral slate borders, sharp spine dividers, subtle bract-scale texture, restrained meadow neutral surfaces.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors: purple bloom, dusty violet, silver green, meadow sage, highland fog, stone slate, ribbed stem olive, spine ivory, deep plum ink.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no blue-purple gradients, no neon, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Thistle", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Thistle dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Thistle". It must feel like the same visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible thistle flower cutout.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, target 3840 x 2160 pixels. Clean professional UI design-system presentation with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Thistle, Thistle Flower, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Preserve the thistle system language: deep plum and slate backgrounds, pale highland-fog text, thistle-purple active states, silver-green secondary controls, mineral slate borders, spine-ivory dividers, bract-scale textures, sturdy 8px shadcn/tweakcn component grid. Must read as thistle, not lavender, artichoke, cactus, generic floral UI, or one-note purple.
Typography: English product UI examples plus Japanese typography guidance; use short labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文. Keep text large and legible.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-style buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, search field, sidebar navigation, top nav, dashboard metric cards, data chart, status chips, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, 8px radius sample, border and shadow tokens, texture swatches, simple icons.
Visual details: deep plum ink surfaces, slate card panels, thistle-purple controls, silver-green charts, spine-ivory focus rings, muted meadow-sage status chips, subtle spiny bract texture overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors: purple bloom, dusty violet, silver green, meadow sage, highland fog, stone slate, ribbed stem olive, spine ivory, deep plum ink.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic blue-purple gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no tiny unreadable paragraphs, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Thistle".
